unverified_claims: Market share percentages per company (OpenAI 35%, Google 28%, etc.) are estimates based on ARR reports and analyst commentary — exact figures not independently confirmed
On-device multimodal inference $10B+ opportunity by 2028 is an extrapolation from analyst trend data, not a single published forecast
GPT-4o real-time API cost reduction of 80% since 2023 is based on published OpenAI pricing changes, not from a single aggregated source
notes: Market size figures vary significantly across forecasters ($2.18B to $3.85B in 2026) due to differing definitions of 'multimodal AI' — some include only multimodal foundation model platforms, others include all applications and downstream tools. Using Mordor Intelligence's $3.85B as the headline figure as it represents a mid-range consensus for the platform market specifically.
